title: Columns name language changing according to the set browser language
excerpt:
Hello everyone, 
I work in a bilingual workplace (English/French) and we need to ensure an equal representation of both languages in our work processes due to very strict labor laws in our province. I would like to avoid…

posts.author: FNL (Francis Nadeau Lussier)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

I work in a bilingual workplace (English/French) and we need to ensure an equal representation of both languages in our work processes due to very strict labor laws in our province. I would like to avoid having to include both the english name and the french translation when I name the columns in each board.

Would it be possible to include a “translation” field in the backend of each column that would give a user the ability of toggling between one language or another on any given board (as long as this translation field would be filled out in the backend, of course).

I’m also curious to hear if somebody else here had to deal with something similar before?

Thank you!

posts.author: dperrier (Dominic L.-Perrier)
posts.cookedHtml: Same thing here! Can someone gives us an update on this ?

posts.author: jtho-seif (Jérémie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all !

Same use case here

posts.author: DMV (Carrie Walker)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I was just trying to see how to do this and came across your post from 2021. Was this feature ever implemented please? Thank you

posts.author: FNL (Francis Nadeau Lussier)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Carrie,

This feature was not implemented and I wouldn’t hold my breath for it. Monday will normally prioritize features according to the number of votes on a request.

As a workaround, we’ve started including both English and French translations in all field names.

Hope that helps!

posts.author: DMV (Carrie Walker)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for taking the time to come back to me!

Many thanks

posts.author: ksiska (Karla Siska)
posts.cookedHtml: We are also looking for something like that!! any word from Monday?

posts.author: cgodbou (Charles Godbout)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi There,

I would also like to have such feature !! For each column’s name, and also for labels (in multiple choices or unique choice type of columns)

I think a property to columns allowing users to choose additional languages (system based) and let them enter their own translation would be a good start or I think the best. Because some translation can be horrible in a specific context.

Same for labels.

Thanks!

posts.author: MartijnR (Martijn)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,
I’m a developer for Monday.com. I completely understand the frustration that comes with dealing with multilingual forms, and I believe I can build a solution to address this issue.

I’d love to connect with others facing this challenge to better understand the specifics and create the most effective solution. Unfortunately, Monday.com doesn’t offer a chat feature, but if you’re interested in discussing this further, feel free to leave a reply here with your preferred method of contact (such as email or LinkedIn), and we can chat directly.

Thanks in advance, looking forward to connecting!

posts.author: cgodbou (Charles Godbout)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Martijn

Yes I would be glad to help providing ideas!

Reach out to me via this email address for further chat.

Thanks !

posts.author: frossini (Fab Rossini)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
Did you work more in this? Are you still looking for feedback?
THanks,
